Hero.title: Yoga Teacher Training in Bali
Hero.description: Yoga Alliance certified 100hr, 200hr and 300hr courses in Ubud. Small batches, experienced teachers and real practice.
Hero.subtitle: Yoga Alliance certified teacher training in Ubud, Bali

Course100.title: 100-Hour Yoga Teacher Training
Course100.summary: An 11-day multi-style Yoga Teacher Training course for beginner yogis, accredited by Yoga Alliance.

Course200.title: 200-Hour Yoga Teacher Training
Course200.summary: Our flagship 21-day immersion for beginner and intermediate yogis. Become a Yoga Alliance certified teacher and teach worldwide.

Course300.title: 300-Hour Advanced Teacher Training
Course300.summary: For certified 200-hour teachers ready to deepen practice and teaching through advanced asana, philosophy and mentorship.

FeaturedCourses.title: Yoga Teacher Training Programs
FeaturedCourses.subtitle: Choose your yoga path
FeaturedCourses.ctaText: Yoga Alliance certified 100, 200 and 300 hour programs

Manifesto.title: Our Philosophy
Manifesto.quote: Yoga is for everyone. It is a harmonious blend of Traditional Wisdom and Modern Science.
Manifesto.description1: Bali YTTC is a Yoga Alliance registered school in Ubud. The programs combine asana, pranayama, meditation, anatomy, philosophy and teaching methodology in one structured residential experience.
Manifesto.description2: The goal is not just a certificate. Students leave with a stronger personal practice, clearer teaching language, and enough supervised practice to guide a real class with confidence.
Manifesto.point2: Traditional practice backed by practical anatomy

Pillars.title: The Six Pillars
Pillars.subtitle: The spiritual and practical framework for confident yoga teachers
